snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: IND vs NZ, Final Match Today, Live Cricket Match Today| INDIA vs New Zealand Live | World Cup Final
snippet.description:
#livestream #cricketlive #t20worldcup 
#Cricket

Hello and welcome to By The Way Cricket Channel 
Host : Shahid 



Today Topic : IND vs NZ, Final Match Today, Live Cricket Match Today| INDIA vs New Zealand Live | World Cup Final

🔴Match :  The Grand Finale: India vs New Zealand
🔴Venue: Narendra Modi Stadium, Ahmedabad
🔴Date : 08 MAR 2026
🔴Time: 7:30pm IST


Details about this Match :

Will New Zealand clinch their maiden T20 World Cup title, or will India become the first team to successfully defend the crown and lift the trophy at home? To find out,

Both teams have had different match-winners stepping up at crucial stages of the tournament, which has propelled them into the summit clash. For India, the likes of Ishan Kishan, Jasprit Bumrah, Sanju Samson, Hardik Pandya, Suryakumar Yadav and Shivam Dube have delivered when it mattered the most. New Zealand, meanwhile, have relied on the contributions of Finn Allen, Tim Seifert, Rachin Ravindra and Matt Henry.

The centre pitch is likely to be used for the grand finale. It is expected to be a mixed-soil surface, similar to the one used for the Indian Premier League final in 2025 and different from the pitch that was used during the 2023 ODI World Cup final at this venue.

Topics we are going to Discuss :👉👉

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

snippet.title: TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

#tateereesong #tatirisong #tateeree #badshah #badshahsong #badshahnewsong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongsharyanavi #haryanvisongs #haryanvigane #hrsong #newharyanvisong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025 #haryanvidjsong #haryanviculture  

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

🔥 Turn up the volume and enjoy the vibe of TATEEREE.

TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

#tateereesong #tatirisong #tateeree #badshah #badshahsong #badshahnewsong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongsharyanavi #haryanvisongs #haryanvigane #hrsong #newharyanvisong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025 #haryanvidjsong #haryanviculture  

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

🔥 Turn up the volume and enjoy the vibe of TATEEREE.

👍 Like | 🔔 Subscribe | 💬 Comment | 📤 Share

#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म –  किसान बहुरिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , ख़ुशी झा  , विद्या  सिंह  , गोलू  तिवारी  , अशोक  मिश्रा  , सुधा  यादव

संगीतकार- ओम झा

छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )

snippet.title: Why Dhurandhar: The Revenge Could Be India’s BIGGEST EVER Movie
snippet.description:
In this video, we talk about the details seen in the Dhurandhar: The Revenge trailer. The trailer does not reveal much of the story, but some scenes give hints about the plot and how the story might move forward. We discuss how the film appears to focus on Pakistan’s proxy war tactics and how the narrative may develop around that theme. The trailer also seems to show parts of Ranveer Singh’s character’s early life before his mission connected to Pakistan. We also cover the strong reactions and discussions that started after the trailer was released, showing how much hype the movie has created. Reports suggest that another film, Toxic, postponed its release around the same time. We also discuss how newer directors like Aditya Dhar are bringing a different style and approach to Bollywood storytelling.

The thePJ is a web channel intended to promote cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the compete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we asset our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

Rozhodli jsme se tuto sérii nazvat Minecraft Manhunt. Tohle video je jiné provedení, kde je ŠEST lovců místo TŘÍ lovců nebo jen jednoho. 

Tohle je nová “Minecraft, ale…” challenge v 1.21.11, kterou jsme se rozhodli vyzkoušet. Snažím se vyhrát, zatímco se mi to můj kamarád George A můj kamarád Sapnap A můj kamarád BadBoyHalo A můj kamarád Antfrost A můj kamarád awesamdude A moje kamarádka CaptainPuffy snaží překazit. Je to super intenzivní závod, během kterého jsme se hodně nasmáli. Zbožňuju tyto výzvy. 

Když tohle video získá 500 000 liků, tak uděláme rematch! 

Ne “Minecraft, ale zvedá se hladina vody” nebo “Minecraft, ale zvedá se hladina lávy”, ani žádná podobná challenge. Tohle je Minecraft speedrun / speedrunner proti zabijákovi / vrahovi

Αν αυτό το βίντεο πάρει 500.000 likes, θα κάνουμε μια ρεβάνς!

Όχι Minecraft, αλλά το Νερό Ανεβαίνει ή Minecraft, αλλά η Λάβα Ανεβαίνει, ή οποιαδήποτε άλλη τέτοια πρόκληση. Αυτό είναι ένα speed run / speed runner του Minecraft εναντίον ενός δολοφόνου / assassin

ta.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
ta.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. நீங்கள் அதைக் கேட்டீர்கள். தொடரின் தொடர்ச்சி. இது முற்றிலும் பைத்தியக்காரத்தனமாக இருந்தது.

எனது சமூக ஊடகங்களைப் பின்தொடரவும்:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பாகும், அங்கு மூன்று வேட்டைக்காரர்களுக்குப் பதிலாக ஆறு வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் அல்லது ஒருவர் மட்டுமே உள்ளனர்.

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் சப்னாப் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் பேட்பாய்ஹாலோ மற்றும் என் நண்பர் ஆண்ட்ஃப்ரோஸ்ட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் அவெசம்டுட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் கேப்டன் பஃபி நான் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வது எனக்கு மிகவும் பிடிக்கும்.

இந்த வீடியோ 500,000 லைக்குகளைப் பெற்றால், நாங்கள் மீண்டும் ஒரு போட்டியை நடத்துவோம்!

மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் வாட்டர் ரைசஸ் அல்லது மைன்கிராஃப்ட், ஆனால் லாவா ரைசஸ், அல்லது வேறு ஏதேனும் ஆனால் அது போன்ற சவால். இது ஒரு கொலையாளி / கொலையாளிக்கு எதிரான மைன்கிராஃப்டின் வேக ஓட்டம் / வேக ஓட்டப்பந்தய வீரர்.

uk.title: Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців
uk.description:
Майнкрафт Спідранер Проти 6 Мисливців Ви просили. Це продовження серій. Це було абсолютне божевілля.

Ми вирішили назвати ці серії Майнкрафт Менхантом. Це відео це інша інтерпретація, де є ШІСТЬ мисливців замість ТРЬОХ або лише одного. 

Це новий Майнкрафт, але 1.21.11 виклик що ми вирішили спробувати. Я намагаюсь пройти гру, поки мій друг Джордж і мій друг Сепнеп і мій друг БедБойХало і мій друг Антфрост і мій друг Авсемдуд і моя подруга КапітанПаффі намагаються не дати мені цього зробити. Це перегони і вони дуже інтенсивні і ми мали над чим посміятись. Люблю займатись цими викликами. 

Якщо це відео набере 500,000 лайків ми повторимо матч!

Не Майнкрафт, Але Вода Підіймається або Майнкрафт, Але Лава Підіймається, або будь-який подібний виклик. Це швидкісне проходження / спідранер Майкрафту проти кіллера / вбивці

আমরা এই সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । এই  ভিডিওটি কারি আরেক রূপ, যেখানে ৬ জন হান্টার আছে চীন অথবা একজনের বদলে।
এটি একটি নতুন Minecraft 1.21.11 চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা চেষ্টা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। আমি গেমটি জেতার চেষ্টা করি, আর আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবয়হেলো, অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট, অসমডুড এবং ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি আমাকে বাধা দেওয়ার চেষ্টা করে। এটি মূলত একটি দৌড় প্রতিযোগিতা, এটি অত্যন্ত উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ ছিল এবং আমরা প্রচুর মজা করেছি। আমি এই ধরনের চ্যালেঞ্জগুলো করতে খুব পছন্দ করি।
যদি এই ভিডিওতে ৫০০,০০০ লাইক পড়ে, তবে আমরা আবার এর একটি ফিরতি ম্যাচ  খেলব!
এটি "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু জল বাড়ছে" বা "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু লাভা বাড়ছে"—এই ধরণের কোনো চ্যালেঞ্জ নয়। এটি একজন খুনি বা আততায়ীর বিরুদ্ধে মাইনক্রাফটের একজন স্পিডরানার-এর টিকে থাকার লড়াই।

మేము ఈ సిరీస్‌ను Minecraft Manhunt అని పిలవాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. ఈ వీడియో దాని యొక్క భిన్నమైన వెర్షన్, ఇక్కడ ముగ్గురు వేటగాళ్ళు లేదా ఒకరు మాత్రమే కాకుండా ఆరుగురు వేటగాళ్ళు ఉన్నారు.

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటలో గెలవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, నా స్నేహితుడు జార్జ్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు సప్నాప్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు అద్భుతం మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు కెప్టెన్‌పఫీ నన్ను అలా చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రంగా ఉంటుంది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం నాకు చాలా ఇష్టం.

ఈ వీడియోకు 500,000 లైక్‌లు వస్తే, మనం తిరిగి మ్యాచ్ చేస్తాము!

మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ కాదు, కానీ వాటర్ రైజెస్ లేదా మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్, కానీ లావా రైజెస్, లేదా మరేదైనా కానీ అలాంటి సవాలు. ఇది కిల్లర్ / హంతకుడిపై మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ యొక్క స్పీడ్ రన్ / స్పీడ్ రన్నర్.

#MinecraftManhunt

zh.title: 我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人
zh.description:
我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人，你们一直在催的内容来了——这个系列的续作！这一次的对决简直疯狂到离谱。

关注我的社交平台：
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

周边商品：
https://dream.shop/

参与者：
BadBoyHalo @thesaintsofgames
George @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap @Sapnap
Antfrost @Antfrost
awesamdude @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy @CaptainPuffy

我们把这个系列称为 Minecraft Manhunt（我的世界猎人游戏）。不过这一次的版本和以往不同——不是三名猎人，也不是一名猎人，而是整整六名猎人！

这是一次基于 Minecraft 1.21.11 的全新挑战：
我的目标是通关游戏，而我的朋友 George、Sapnap、BadBoyHalo、Antfrost、awesamdude 和 CaptainPuffy 的唯一任务，就是不惜一切代价阻止我。这是一场竞速对决，节奏紧张到爆，全程高能，我们也笑个不停。我真的很喜欢做这种挑战。

如果这个视频达到 50 万点赞，我们就来一场复赛！

这不是"Minecraft，但水位上升"或"Minecraft，但岩浆上升"那类“MC但是...挑战”。这是 Minecraft 速通者 vs 猎人/刺客 的极限对抗。

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood#hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.description:
The Cinema Show | Episode 1361 | March 09

In today’s episode of The Cinema Show, we’ll take a look at how audience is reacting to the postponement of Yash led Toxic. We’ll also bring you the latest update on Salman Khan starrer much-talked-about superhero film. And along with that, we’ll discuss why the leaked photos of Ranbir Kapoor from the sets of Ramayana have sparked criticism online. Watch The Cinema Show to not miss out on important updates from the World of Cinema.

snippet.title: Chaitra Mangala Osha Katha | ଚୈତ୍ର ମଙ୍ଗଳା ଓଷା କଥା | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଓଡ଼ିଆ ପରମ୍ପରାରେ ଚୈତ୍ର ମଙ୍ଗଳବାରର ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱ ଅତି ଅନନ୍ୟ। ପରିବାରର ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଏବଂ ସମସ୍ତ ବିପଦରୁ ରକ୍ଷା ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ମା' ମଙ୍ଗଳାଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ମରଣ କରି କରାଯାଉଥିବା "ଚୈତ୍ର ମଙ୍ଗଳା ଓଷା କଥା" ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ପ୍ରିୟ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ। ମା'ଙ୍କର ଏହି କଥା ଶ୍ରବଣ କଲେ ମନର ସବୁ ଅଭିଳାଷ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୁଏ ବୋଲି ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ରହିଛି।

#ChaitraMangalaOsha #NamitaAgrawal #sidharthmusic #OdiaOshaKatha #MaaMangala #OdiaDevotional #TraditionalOdisha #ChaitraMangalabar #OshaBrata

snippet.title: TORE KE LET RAHIYO (Song): Aashish Yadav | Khushi Kakkar | Neha Singh | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
भोजपुरी संगीत प्रेमियों के लिए पेश है धमाकेदार गाना "तोरे की लेत रहियो (Tore Ke Let Rahiyo)" । इस गाने को अपनी मधुर आवाज़ दी है आशीष यादव और खुशी कक्कड़ ने। शानदार बोल लिखे हैं चिंटू राजा ने और इसका दमदार संगीत तैयार किया है चमन सिंह ने।

#ToreKiLetRahiyo #AashishYadav #khushikakkar 

Credits:
Featuring- Aashish Yadav, Neha Singh
Singers- Aashish Yadav, Khushi Kakkar
Lyrics:- Chintu Raja
Music :- Chaman Singh 
Video Director- Ashish Satyarthi
Project Manager- T-Series- Sonu Srivastava
Post Production- Vicky Ji
Editor- Papu Varama
Di- Rohit Singh
Dop -Rahul Yadav
Choreographer - Aslam Ji


SUBSCRIBE T-Series channel Hamaar Bhojpuri for unlimited entertainment
http://www.youtube.com/hamaarbhojpuri
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/

snippet.title: Dhadkana | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | Ishqa'n De Lekhe | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Movie Song
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents “Dhadkana”, a new Punjabi song sung by Gurnam Bhullar from the Punjabi movie Ishqa'n De Lekhe. Featuring Isha Malviya and Gurnam Bhullar, this latest Punjabi song beautifully captures deep emotions, making it one of the most touching tracks from the Punjabi movie’s soundtrack.

Whether you enjoy Punjabi songs, love listening to Punjabi movie songs, or are a fan of Gurnam Bhullar songs, Dhadkana is sure to connect with your heart. Add this to your playlist and experience the charm of this Punjabi film song. Also check out other movie songs from Ishqa'n De Lekhe like “Ishq Tur Ke Aa Gya” and “Mohabbat”, which capture the same emotional depth and romantic vibe.

Stay tuned for more Punjabi songs, Punjabi film songs, and the latest releases from Speed Records.

snippet.title: 90's Weds Genz Season 2 Trailer | Sushma Gopal | Mohit Pedada | Telugu Web Series | Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
#90sWedsGenZSeason2Trailer #SushmaGopal #MohitPedada #TeluguWebSeries2026 #infinitummedia 

Get ready for more fun, love, and generational clashes with 90's Weds GenZ Season 2! 

"90's Weds Genz" is a Telugu Romcom Web Series Featuring Sushma Gopal &  Mohit Pedada as leads.

Cast: Sushma Gopal, Mohith Pedada, Master Arav, Sahithi, Praveen Kinthali, Mahendra Ganchari, Sunitha Manohar.

Producer: Vandana Banduru

Writen & Directed by Tej Surya

Dop: Vikas Pathipaka, Suraj 

Music: Akshay malipeddi 

Editing & Di: Tara Chandra Shekar Reddy

Motion Graphics: Venkata Koushik

Pulicity Designer: Nikhil Chotu.

Dubbing Engineer: Venkat, Bhaskar 

Executive Producer: Rahul Nimmakuri

snippet.title: कमर के किराया (4K Video) #Srishti Bharti | Feat. Sunita Singh | Kamar Ke Kiraya | New Bhojpuri Song
snippet.description:
वेव म्यूजिक (Wave Music) पेश करते हैं भोजपुरी की सुरीली आवाज़ सृष्टि भारती का साल 2026 का सबसे नया और धमाकेदार गाना "कमर के किराया"। इस गाने में सुनीता सिंह ने अपनी बेहतरीन अदाकारी और डांस से तड़का लगाया है।

इस गाने को 4K अल्ट्रा एचडी (Ultra HD) क्वालिटी में देखें और झूमने पर मजबूर हो जाएं। अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आए, तो कृपया लाइक करें, कमेंट करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें!

Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :-

►Song - Kamar Ke Kiraya
►Singer - Srishti Bharti
►Featuring - Sunita Singh
►Lyrics - Jonny Ji
►Music Director - Jonny Ji
►Video Director - Govind Prajapati
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 44606

♪ Spotify :
♪ Gaana : 
♪ Jio Saavn : 
♪ Apple Music : 
♪ Amazon Prime Music : 
♪ YouTube Music : 
♪ Instagram Reels : 
♪ Spotify Playlist : https://open.spotify.com/user/31wrrqxq4vi7pg57rnkxcna4tcqu?si=eed3103487f24692


Connected with us !

👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08


#SrishtiBharti #SunitaSingh #KamarKeKiraya #BhojpuriSong2026 #WaveMusic #NewBhojpuri #BhojpuriVideo #BhojpuriHit #LatestBhojpuri #ViralBhojpuri 

Lyrics - 

Mukhda
बहाना बनवत आज कल बड़ा
केकर  चलवात चापा कल बड़ा 
तोहरा बॉडी से महक उहे मिलता 
बहाना बावत आज कल बड़ा 
पता चल ल ह किनी कि सूट नया दे तार 
कवना सौतिन क़े ए रजऊ कमर क़े किरिया  दे तार २

Antra-1
हम कमाई करी सी सी क़े बेलॉज 
तु झा र फुटानी रोज टोला में काके पखाउज २
नायकि देवाल  में जाके पाया दे तार तू  त पाया दे तार
कवना सौतिन क़े ए रजऊ कमर क़े किरिया  दे तार २

Antra-2
क रत क रत काम परल ठेला रजऊ
कवना सथे बड़ा क रत  खेला रजऊ  २
हमर रोजे कहु कई हमर काया दे तार तू  त काया दे तार २
कवना सौतिन क़े ए रजऊ कमर क़े किरिया  दे तार २

इस गाने को 4K अल्ट्रा एचडी (Ultra HD) क्वालिटी में देखें और झूमने पर मजबूर हो जाएं। अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आए, तो कृपया लाइक करें, कमेंट करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें!

Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :-

►Song - Kamar Ke Kiraya

Lyrics - 

Mukhda
बहाना बनवत आज कल बड़ा
केकर  चलवात चापा कल बड़ा 
तोहरा बॉडी से महक उहे मिलता 
बहाना बावत आज कल बड़ा 
पता चल ल ह किनी कि सूट नया दे तार 
कवना सौतिन क़े ए रजऊ कमर क़े किरिया  दे तार २

Antra-1
हम कमाई करी सी सी क़े बेलॉज 
तु झा र फुटानी रोज टोला में काके पखाउज २
नायकि देवाल  में जाके पाया दे तार तू  त पाया दे तार
कवना सौतिन क़े ए रजऊ कमर क़े किरिया  दे तार २

Antra-2
क रत क रत काम परल ठेला रजऊ
कवना सथे बड़ा क रत  खेला रजऊ  २
हमर रोजे कहु कई हमर काया दे तार तू  त काया दे तार २
कवना सौतिन क़े ए रजऊ कमर क़े किरिया  दे तार २

snippet.title: आदि शीतला माता भवानी Aadi Sheetla Mata Bhawani |शीतला माता भजन, Sheetla Mata Bhajan|ANURADHA PAUDWAL
snippet.description:
होली के सात दिन बाद  शीतला सप्तमी मनाई जाती है, इस दिन माता शीतला की उपासना की जाती है | शीतला सप्तमी एवं अष्टमी को बसौड़ा के नाम से भी जाना जाता है | हिंदू पंचांग के अनुसार, चैत्र माह के कृष्ण पक्ष की सप्तमी तिथि को शीतला सप्तमी मनाई जाती है | माता शीतला को सभी मनोकामनाओं की पूर्ति करने वाली देवी के रूप में पूजा जाता है | मां शीतला को ठंडक प्रदान करने वाली देवी कहा गया है | इनकी उपासना से आरोग्य का वरदान भी प्राप्त होता है | शीतल स्वभाव होने के कारण माता को एक दिवस पूर्व बनाए ठंडे भोजन का भोग लगाया जाता है एवं उसी को बाद में प्रसाद के रूप में ग्रहण किया जाता है | इस दिन घर के सभी सदस्य ठंडा भोजन करते हैं | इस दिन रसोई में भोजन नहीं पकाया जाता है तो आइए शीतला माता को समर्पित अनुराधा पौडवाल द्वारा स्वरबद्ध अनुपम भजन का आनंद लें | 
Subscribe: http://www.youtube.com/tseriesbhakti
🙏https://youtu.be/7PR4IUjckME🙏 

Music Label: T-Series

Devi Bhajan - Sheetla Mata Bhajan: Aadi Sheetla
Singer: Anuradha Paudwal 
Music Label: T-Series

snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla

Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

snippet.title: तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna
snippet.description:
तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।
जय श्री श्याम 🙏
अगर भजन पसंद आए तो

#Video | नाच नागिन जैसन | Raushan Rohi & Khushi Kakkar | Nach Nagin Jaisan | New Maghi Song 2026


Maghi म्यूजिक प्रेमियों के लिए धमाकेदार डांस नंबर “नाच नागिन जैसन” आ चुका है 🎶🔥

Contact for trade enquiry  : 9770566017

LYRICS :
गीतकार - संजय वर्मा 
(पुरुष) 
झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना वो रानी... झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना वो रानी...
तोर कनिहा धर लिही ता, का मैं भरहूँ वो पानी... तोर कनिहा धर लिही ता, का मैं भरहूँ वो पानी...
(महिला) 
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा  [ (पुरुष) अरे नहीं रे .....]
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा  [ (पुरुष) ये दद्दा .....]
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा......

(संवाद - पुरुष) ऐ रानी... सुन तो...

(पुरुष) 
अरे...... 
ऐसे तैं हां डोले ता बड़ डर लागे वो 
माते-माते चले ता फिकर लागे वो

(महिला)
हाय......
Don't worry सांसो ला साइड करा हो
आवा मोर संग मा तहूँ वाइब (vibe) लेवा हो

(पुरुष)
हाय तोर पातर कमर, पूरा महफ़िल गदर
ये ... 
टुक-टुक देखे जब लहर मारे वो टुक-टुक देखे जब लहर मारे वो

(महिला)
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा……. 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा.........

सिटी (vissil)....

(संगीत अंतराल)
तकीड तकीड धा... धा धा धा... धा धा धा... धा धा धा...

(पुरुष):
अरे महफ़िल मा फदित्ता न करवा, चल सीधा घर तोर बताहूँ रे मजा!
(महिला): 
अच्छा! बड़ा भारी मरद बने हवस तैं हां ना, 
घर भर मा चलथे गा तोरे मरदा। 
(पुरुष): 
तोर जोड़त हव हाथ, तोर परत हव पांव... 
इज्जत के फलूदा तैं हां झन वो करा! इज्जत के फलूदा तैं हां झन वो करा!

(महिला)
मैं नाचहूँ, मैं नाचहूँ, गर्दा उड़ा हूँ राजा...................   [ (पुरुष) नहीं रानी.....]
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा

मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा 
मौका हे आज झूम के, धिड़कत हे गाड़वा बाजा...................
 
(पुरुष):
झन नाच ना, झन नाच ना...
(महिला): सुने जी... 
(पुरुष): ना...

snippet.title: Dil Laga Liya Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan | Dil Hai Tumhaara | 2002
snippet.description:
Dil Laga Liya Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke | Alka Yagnik | Udit Narayan | Dil Hai Tumhaara | 2002

Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Tips Films
Director : Kundan Shah
Cast : Preity Zinta, Arjun Rampal, Jimmy Shergill, Mahima Chaudhry & Rekha 

Song Lyrics:

Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa 
Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa

Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Dil Chura Liya
Maine Ikraar Karke 
Ikraar Karke, Ikraar Karke 
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke 

Mere Diljaani Mere
Maahi Mere Dholna 
Koi Sun Lega Zara
Dheere Dheere Bolna 
Haan, Ishq Kiya Hai Maine
Chori Nahin Ki Hai 
Tere Sang Yaara
Jora Jori Nahin Ki Hai 

Chain Le Liya
Maine Beqaraar Karke 
Beqaraar Karke, Beqaraar Karke 
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Beech Safar Mein Kahin
Mera Saath Chhodke 
Tujhko Kasam Hai
Naiyyo Jaana Dil Todke 
Kaise Main Bataaoon Tujhe
Kaisa Mera Haal Ve 
Jeena Marna Hai Sab
Ab Tere Naal Ve 

Tujhko Paa Liya
Tera Intezaar Karke 
Intezaar Karke, Intezaar Karke
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke, Tumse Pyaar Karke

#DilLagaLiya #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #UditNarayan
tags: dil laga liya maine tumse pyaar karke
Ishq Kiya Hai Maine Chori Nahin Ki Hai
Koi Sun Lega Zara Dheere Dheere Bolna

Starring global star Ram Charan and the stunning Janhvi Kapoor, this vibrant track brings electrifying visuals and captivating performances.

Directed by Buchi Babu Sana and composed by the legendary A. R. Rahman, the song delivers a powerful blend of rhythm, melody, and celebration. 💃🕺

Turn up the volume and feel the festive Telugu vibes!

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 

This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

snippet.title: India’s Best Non-Shotgun Player 🔥 Intense Solo vs Squad 1v4 Clutches in Conqueror Lobby | BGMI
snippet.description:
India’s Best Non-Shotgun Player 🔥 Intense Solo vs Squad 1v4 Clutches in Conqueror Lobby | BGMI

Hello, Guys in today's video I will show you pure 1v4 intense close Clutches in Conqueror High Tier lobby with Handcam .
So enjoy the video with my clutches. Check pure 1v4 intense close Clutches Against Pro Streamers in High Tier lobby with Handcam. You can see pure solo vs squad clutches and enjoy.
Another part of Bixi OP vs Youtubers / Streamers Series of BGMI.
So enjoy the video with my clutches.
I clutched against top streamers, and they thought I was hacking 😳
They even reported me live! Was it skill or something else? Watch till the end and decide for yourself 💥
Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more crazy showdowns like this!

snippet.title: Wada Na Tod (Official Lyric Video) | Lata Mangeshkar | Kumar Gaurav,Rati Agnihotri | Dil Tujhko Diya
snippet.description:
"Wada Na Tod" is a soulful and emotional classic sung by the legendary Lata Mangeshkar, featuring Kumar Gaurav and Rati Agnihotri from the film Dil Tujhko Diya. Filled with deep emotions, heartfelt lyrics, and timeless melody, this evergreen song beautifully expresses love, promises, and the pain of separation. A treasured gem from Bollywood’s golden era that continues to touch hearts across generations. ✨❤️ 

Credits: 
Singer: Lata Mangeshkar
Music: Rajesh Roshan 
Lyrics: Rajesh Roshan
Movie: Dil Tujhko Diya 
Starring: Kumar Gaurav, Rati Agnihotri
Director: Rakesh Kumar
Producer: Rakesh Kumar
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Wada na tod tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod  

Wada na tod tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod  

Meri chadti jawani tadpe  

Tu muh na mod tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod  

  

Neend humari piya tune churaye  

Kaha chupa hai piya tu hai harjayee  

Nind humari piya tune churaye  

Kaha chupa hai piya tu hai harjayee  

Meri chadti jawani tadpe tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod  

  

Koi nahi hai tere mere bin yaha pe  

Chal baithe chaav tale dekh wahan pe  

Koi nahi hai tere mere bin yaha pe  

Chal baithe chaav tale dekh wahan pe  

Meri chadti jawani tadpe tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod  

  

Wada nibana hoga saajan tujhko  

Doli me bithake apne ghar le ja mujhko  

  

Wada nibana hoga sajan tujhko  

Doli me bithake apne ghar le ja mujhko  

  

Meri chadti jawani tadpe   

Tu muh na mod tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod 

Meri chadti jawani tadpe  

Tu muh na mod tu wada na tod  

Tu wada na tod tu wada na tod

snippet.title: Zindagi Ki Talash Mein - HD Video | Kumar Sanu | Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar |  Superhit Song
snippet.description:
Zindagi Ki Talash Mein - HD Video | Kumar Sanu | Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar |  Superhit Song

~Credit
Song : Zindagi Ki Talash Mein
Star Cast : Aditya Pancholi, Varsha Usgaonkar, Mohsin Khan, Paresh Rawal, Anupam Kher, Avtar Gill
Singer : Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Bhushan Dua
Lyrics : Sameer

~Lyrics (Zindagi Ki Talash Mein)
Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye

Hum the aise safar pe chale
Jiski koi manzil nahi
Hum ne saari umar jo kiya
Uska koi bhi haasil nahi
Uska koi bhi haasil nahi
Ik khushi ki talaash main the
Kitne gam humko tadpa gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Socho hum kitne mazboor the
Jo na karna tha vo kar gaye
Peechhe mud ke jo dekha zara
Apne halaat se darr gaye
Apne halaat se darr gaye
Khudh ke baare main soche jo hum
Apne aap se sharma gaye
Jab yeh socha to ghabra gaye
Aa gaye hum kahan aa gaye

Zindagi ki talaash mein hum
Maut ke kitne paas aa gaye.

snippet.title: संपूर्ण सुन्दरकाण्ड पाठ | दुख, दरिद्रता और नकारात्मकता को दूर करें | Sunderkand Path | सुंदरकांड
snippet.description:
Sunderkand :-
प्रतिदिन सुंदरकांड पाठ सुनने व पढ़ने से मानसिक शांति, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और आत्मविश्वास में वृद्धि होती है। इससे जीवन की समस्याओं का समाधान होता है, घर में सुख-समृद्धि आती है, और नकारात्मक शक्तियां दूर होती हैं। यह एकाग्रता बढ़ाता है, भय को कम करता है, और जीवन में सफलता दिलाता है

અમારા થઈને અમને ભરમાયા
હો તારા વાળું તે કરી લીધુ અમેં અમારું કરી લેશું...(૨)
હે આજે તુ શે રાજી કાલે અમે રાજી...(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હે હગુ તને મળશે તો હગુ મને મળશે..(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
અમે બોલીને ચો કયા બગાડ્યુંશે 
હો દુનિયા માં કોઈ ના વગર ઊભુ નથી રેતુ 
પોતાના પારકા નથી સેહવાતુ 
હો વાર પછી વારો હઉ નો આવશે
આજ તારી વેળા કાલ અમારી પણ આવશે
હો આજે તુ ઘણી હરખાયશે અમે હરખાશું...(૨)
હે તમે જમો કંસાર અમે છોડશું સંસાર...(૨)
મારે તારા જેવુ ચો થાવુંશે...(૨)
હે મારા દિલ તે બહુ રડાયુશે
-------------------------------

8️⃣Sauthi Savayo Maro Pyar
https://youtu.be/VpzIwd_CbLI

https://youtu.be/4gK-dOBmvoE

અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હો બજાર ના બંગલા વાલા તને લાગ્યા
ઝૂંપડા જોઈ હવે છેટા તમે ભાગ્યા 
હો વધેલા પથરા આવ્યા મારે આડા 
અમારા થઈને અમને ભરમાયા
હો તારા વાળું તે કરી લીધુ અમેં અમારું કરી લેશું...(૨)
હે આજે તુ શે રાજી કાલે અમે રાજી...(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હે હગુ તને મળશે તો હગુ મને મળશે..(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
અમે બોલીને ચો કયા બગાડ્યુંશે 
હો દુનિયા માં કોઈ ના વગર ઊભુ નથી રેતુ 
પોતાના પારકા નથી સેહવાતુ 
હો વાર પછી વારો હઉ નો આવશે
આજ તારી વેળા કાલ અમારી પણ આવશે
હો આજે તુ ઘણી હરખાયશે અમે હરખાશું...(૨)
હે તમે જમો કંસાર અમે છોડશું સંસાર...(૨)
મારે તારા જેવુ ચો થાવુંશે...(૨)
હે મારા દિલ તે બહુ રડાયુશે
-------------------------------

Song Credits:
Song: Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai 
Movie:  Khal Nayak (1993)
Singer: Alka Yagnik & Ila Arun
Composer: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi

Movie Credits:
Cast : Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher
Director : Subhash Ghai
Producer : Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe
Chunari Ke Niche Kya Hai,
Chunari Ke Niche

Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Yeh Dil Mein Dungi Mere Yar Ko, Pyar Ko
Aah Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Lakhon Deewane Tere, Lakhon Deewane
Aashiq Purane Tere, Aashiq Purane
Ho Aashiq Mila Naa Aisa Hmmm,
Meri Pasand Jaisa Hmmm
Be Dil Shahar Yeh Aisa,
Kya Karu Kya Karu
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Resham Kaa Lahanga Meraa,
Resham Kaa Lahanga
Lahanga Hai Mahanga Meraa,
Ahanga Hai Mahanga
Lahanga Utha Ke Chalu,
Ghunghat Gira Ke Chalu
Kya Kya Bacha Ke Chalu Ramaji Ramaji
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Isako Bachalo Babu, Iss Ko Bachalo
Dil Me Chhupalo Babu, Dil Mein Chhupalo
Ho Aashiq Pade Hain Pichhe O Ho
Koyi Idhar Ko Khinche Hmmm
Koyi Udhar Ko Khinche Kya Karu Kya Karu
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Hai Shadi Karado Meri O Ho,
Shadi Karado Hmmm
Doli Sajado Meri Doli
Saja Do Ah Ha Ah Ha
Sautan Bana Naa Jaye,
Jogan Bana Naa Jaye
Joban Saha Naa Jaye
Kya Karu, Kya Karu Hai Chhori
Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Ladaki Ho Kaisi Bolo,
Ladaki Ho Kaisi
Ladaka Ho Kaisa Bolo
Ladaka Ho Kaisa
Ho Ladaki Ho Mere Jaisi Aah Ha,
Ladaka Ho Tere Jaisa Wah Wah
Aaye Maja Phir Kaisa,
Pyar Kaa Pyar Kaa Wah
Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Ho…Jhumari Kaa Jumaru Ban Ja,
Jhumari Kaa Jumaru Kich Kich
Payal Kaa, Ghungharu Ban Ja
Payal Kaa Ghungaru Kich Kich
Meri Salami Kar Le, Meri Ghulami Kar Le
Hoga Too Hoga Koyi
Badashah, Badashah Are Jan
Ku Ku Ku…………

Bali Umariya Meri Bali Umariya
Suni Sajariya Meri Suni Sajariya
Mere Sapano Ke Raja,
Jaldi Se Vapas Aaja Ah
Soti Hoon Main
Daravaja Khol Ke, Khol Ke Ah
Ku Ku Ku…………

Begam Bagair Badashah Kis Kam Kaa
Badashah Bagair Begam Kis Kam Ki
Teri Marazi Tu Jane, Meri Marazi Main Janu
Maine Jawani Tere Naam Ki, Naam Ki Ho Chori

Choli Ke Pichhe Kya Hai, Choli Ke Pichhe
Choli Ke Pichhe Kya Hai, Choli Ke Pichhe
Chunari Ke Niche Kya Hai, Chunari Ke Niche
Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera Aah Ha
Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera Vah Vah
Yeh Dil Mein Dungi Mere Yar Ko, Pyar Ko

Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Hoon Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Dil…Dil Hai Meraa…
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Dil…Dil Hai Meraa…
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Dil…Dil Hai Meraa…

Resham Kaa Lahanga Meraa,
Resham Kaa Lahanga

snippet.title: Nain (Official Visual) Hustinder | Ricky Khan | Baba Raja | Him & Her | Latest Punjabi Song
snippet.description:
Tdot Records presents the official visualizer for “Nain” by Hustinder, from the EP Him & Her. This pure romantic Punjabi track, sung from a male perspective, reflects the beauty of keeping love private to protect it from the evil eye. The song’s heartfelt hook captures how her eyes alone express their unspoken love.

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/4JTJO56mY4DRHW7x0czn4w?si=f3O4SxCASRigho4Z1-rb5Q
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/ca/album/nain/1873263629?i=1873263639

Song: Nain
Singer: Hustinder
Lyrics/Composer: Ricky Khan
Music: Baba Raja
Mix/Master: Arron

Visual Credits:
Director/Concept: Sumeet Dhiman
BTS: Creative Scene Studios 
AD: Kabir Singh
